assumptions.description: Classified assumptions combining structural and value-type assumptions from the model.

building_block.description: Which variable or building block this assumption relates to (e.g., earnings growth, valuation, inflation, dividend yield).

classification.description: Exactly one classification: mean-reversion (variable reverts to equilibrium), historical (based on past data/averages), or forward-looking (based on expectations/forecasts/current pricing).

forward_backward_explanation.description: Brief explanation (1-3 sentences) of why the model is classified as forward- or backward-looking.

index_of_forwardness.description: Numeric judgment from -1 (fully backward-looking) to 1 (fully forward-looking).
